metadata.description: The subject is a female presenting individual in their 30s to 40s. They have a warm olive skin tone with a smooth texture, showing some subtle fine lines around the eyes and scattered small freckles across the cheeks and nose. Their face is an oval shape with a gently rounded jawline. Dark brown hair is pulled back into a neat bun, revealing a clean hairline. The eyes are a striking amber color, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. Eyebrows are medium thickness and gently arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness with a well-defined cupid's bow. The expression is a soft, closed-mouth smile, and the head is angled slightly to the right, looking directly at the viewer.
